scenario.name: Mini PBX UAC REGISTER with Auth
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.local>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:1001@pbx.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.local>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:1001@pbx.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 [authentication username=1001 password=1001] Content-Length: 0
